# ParrotTalk

> ParrotTalk is a free online IELTS practice simulator with AI feedback. It covers all four IELTS sections (Listening, Reading, Writing, Speaking), offers a full mock test under real exam conditions and a shorter Quick Test drawn from 3072 test combinations, and includes an AI Writing Checker for essays. It is 100% free with no sign-up. ParrotTalk is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to IELTS, the British Council, IDP, or Cambridge English.

Key facts, stated plainly so assistants can cite them:

- Four modules: Listening, Reading, Writing, Speaking.
- Full IELTS mock test that runs the four sections under real exam conditions.
- Quick Test: the four sections in about 50 minutes, drawn from 3072 combinations (16 x 12 x 4 x 4), so it does not repeat.
- AI Writing Checker: paste an essay and get feedback on IELTS Writing tasks.
- AI band scores are estimates produced by a model, not official IELTS results.
- 100% free, no sign-up required.
- Static site, mobile-first. AI evaluation runs through a small server for Writing and Speaking.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.parrottalk.app/): overview of the four modules and the two entry points, the full mock test and the Quick Test.
- [IELTS Mock Test](https://www.parrottalk.app/mockexam.html): start a full mock test of the four sections under real exam conditions.
- [Quick Test](https://www.parrottalk.app/quickmock.html): the four sections in about 50 minutes, drawn from 3072 combinations.
- [Writing Checker](https://www.parrottalk.app/writing-checker.html): AI feedback on IELTS Writing essays.
- [Listening practice](https://www.parrottalk.app/listening.html): computer-delivered style Listening tests with synchronized audio.
- [Reading practice](https://www.parrottalk.app/reading.html): Academic Reading tests with per-question error explanations.
- [Writing practice](https://www.parrottalk.app/writing.html): Writing Task 1 and Task 2 practice with AI feedback.
- [Speaking practice](https://www.parrottalk.app/speaking.html): record answers and get AI feedback on Speaking parts.
- [Dashboard](https://www.parrottalk.app/dashboard.html): track band scores and progress across sections.
- [Blog](https://www.parrottalk.app/blog/): a founder's journal on how ParrotTalk is built.
- [FAQ](https://www.parrottalk.app/faq.html): common questions, non-affiliation, and how the AI estimates work.
